ocr.text: At 12 Weeks, the Change In SPPB from baseline for ST is 1.0±1.9*, for PT is 1.0±1.5*, and for Controls is −0.5±1.9, with the
Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control being 1.51 (P Value 0.005, CI 0.44, 2.58) and for PT vs. control being 1.61 (P Value
0.004, CI 0.48, 2.73). At 24 Weeks, ST shows a Change In SPPB of 0.0±3.5, PT is at 1.9±2.4, and Controls at 0.3±3.4, with the
Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control at 0.16 (P Value 0.87, CI −1.86, 2.18) and for PT vs. control at 1.32 (P Value 0.20, CI
−0.75, 3.40). At 36 Weeks, the Change In SPPB for ST is −0.2±3.9, for PT is 1.8±3.0, and for Controls is −0.5±4.1, with the
Effect (Beta coefficient) for ST vs. control at 1.05 (P Value 0.34, CI −1.16, 3.25) and for PT vs.
